default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review a GTM campaign POC and plan next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**POC Handover:** Imran will transfer the Clay POC table for the LinkedIn engagement campaign to Jason, enabling immediate use.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**DIY Execution:** Jason will manage the campaign internally, integrating HubSpot filters to prevent messaging existing contacts and adding email outreach via Instantly.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [**Website De-anonymization:** This will be a separate email-only campaign to avoid risking LinkedIn account limits (200-250 requests/month).](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [**SIFT Pricing:** The model is 1 credit per person per month, regardless of activity volume or webhook destinations.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

## Topics

### LinkedIn Engagement Campaign POC

  - [Imran demoed a POC automating outreach to LinkedIn post engagers, built in Clay.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
    1.  [**Trigger:** SIFT webhook fires on a user's post engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
    2.  [**Enrichment:** SIFT auto-enriches \~90% of contacts; Clay fills the rest.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
    3.  [**Categorization:** Clay assigns persona (e.g., "Director+ Marketing") and intent (e.g., "AU SEO").](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
    4.  [**Action:** Clay generates a personalized LinkedIn DM with a relevant offer.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [**Flexibility:** The workflow can route leads to external tools like HeyReach or Instantly based on intent.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

### Campaign Execution & Refinements

  - [Jason will take over the POC for internal execution.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [**HubSpot Integration:** Jason will add a Clay step to filter out existing contacts before outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [**Email Outreach:** The campaign will be expanded to include email, leveraging growthx.ai's Instantly setup.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [**Lead Source Expansion:** The goal is to monitor more sources (team posts, competitors, topics via Trigify) to scale the "always-on" campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [**Copy Strategy:** Keep copy general to accommodate multiple lead sources (e.g., personal vs. competitor posts) and enable scale.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)

### Website De-anonymization Strategy

  - [**Recommendation:** Use a separate, email-only campaign for de-anonymized website visitors.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Avoids risking LinkedIn account limits (200-250 connection requests/month).](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
    1.  [SIFT sends identified *companies* (higher coverage) to Clay.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
    2.  [SIFT finds 3 top-persona contacts at that company.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
    3.  [Clay sends a general email offer to those contacts.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**Multi-threading:** The workflow can target multiple personas (e.g., Growth, Marketing, Founder) at the same company.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)

### SIFT Pricing & Services

  - [**Credit Model:** 1 credit per person per month.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensures cost predictability, as a contact is charged only once monthly regardless of activity volume or webhook destinations.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [**Services:** Imran offered GTM engineering services (enrichment, Clay, HubSpot plumbing) as a more affordable alternative to agencies.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Referral:** Imran referred Jason to Kamil at 42 Agency for broader HubSpot strategy (tracking, attribution), as it's outside SIFT's core focus.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Imran:**](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Transfer the LinkedIn engagement Clay table to Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Sketch out the email workflow within the table.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [Upgrade the SIFT account (3 days remaining on trial).](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
      - [Integrate HubSpot filters into the Clay workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [Add the email outreach step using Instantly.](https://fathom.video/share/ju9pj3UizXxqf5dnRa8b8cSaVQg1sxqA?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
